name: @tootallnate/ff8-fs
description: Pure-JS parser for Final Fantasy VIII's `.fs` / `.fi` / `.fl` archive triplets used by every PC release (and verbatim on the Switch Remastered port). `.fl` lists per-entry Windows-style paths, `.fi` indexes (uncompressed-size, offset-in-fs, compression-flag), `.fs` is the concatenated payload with FF7-style LZSS compression on flagged entries. Pairs with `@tootallnate/ff7-flevel` (whose LZSS decoder is the same variant FF8 uses).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
